items.title: Red Sox Skipper Sends 4-Word Trevor Story Message As Concerns Mount
items.summary: Boston Red Sox manager Alex Cora offered a direct response when asked if it’s time to move the shortstop out of the two hole.

items.title: Former Top Prospect Taj Bradley Dealing For Twins - Is It Real?
items.summary: Acquired from the Rays for Griffin Jax in 2025, Bradley has had two very successful starts to open 2026. Below the surface, however, contact management issues persist.

items.title: Midi Health: Menopause Is The Starting Gun, Not The Finish Line
items.summary: Midi Health’s Joanna Strober built the first menopause unicorn on one argument: Menopause is the starting gun for women's longevity, not the finish line.

items.title: Catherine O’Hara’s Death Stopped Popular Sitcom Sequel Plans
items.summary: Dan Levy, co-creator and star of Schitt’s Creek, has opened up about how Catherine O’Hara’s death in January 2026 put a stop to any potential sequel plans for the acclaimed comedy. Levy also talked about her talent, their memories, and why the show remains irreplaceable.
